seo.title: Inled InSuite — Free, Private Online Office Suite
seo.description: Open and edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for free. 100% private, no installation. Your files never leave the browser.
seo.keywords: free online office, edit word online, private online excel, office without registration, digital sovereignty, inled insuite

hero.title: The free, open, and
hero.description: Total privacy without installations. Open, edit, and save your documents directly in the browser. Your files never leave your computer.
hero.editorLegend: Interact with the editor. It is a real instance running 100% in your browser via WebAssembly.

features.description: Because it is made with you in mind, not for financial gain. Because it is free, private, and made in Spain.

feature1.title: Made in Spain
feature1.desc: The free, no-installation, 100% compatible office suite created in Spain for Spain.

feature2.title: 100% Private
feature2.desc: Nothing is uploaded to storage. Everything stays in your browser. We comply with the strictest European and Spanish privacy regulations by not collecting a single piece of data, not even analytics.

feature3.title: No installation required
feature3.desc: Everything works in the browser; you only need a file explorer to upload documents and a browser to use the editor.

editors.title: Professional Tools
editors.subtitle: Powerful desktop editors, now in your browser. 100% compatible with your usual files.

docx.name: Documents
docx.desc: Compatible with .docx. The same power as Microsoft Word, but a thousand times better than Google Docs.

xlsx.name: Spreadsheets
xlsx.desc: Compatible with .xlsx. Perform complex analysis and formulas with full compatibility.

pptx.name: Presentations
pptx.desc: Compatible with .pptx. Create impactful slides directly in your browser.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.desc: Translation, local AI, spell check, and more. Customize your office with our catalog.

comparison.title: Honest comparison
comparison.subtitle: The best way for you to see why InSuite is the best choice is to compare it with other options on the market.

ziziyi.diff: Cannot export to PDF. No browser saving.

libreoffice.diff: Poor interface, requires installation, low compatibility with Office

cta.title: It is time,
cta.description: Do not let your data stay in storage, be charged for simply editing documents, be forced to install something, or be subjected to foreign regulations.
cta.footer: By using InSuite, you are using free, private, and Spanish software

about.title: About Inled Group
about.description: Inled Group is a software brand focused on privacy, Spanish technological sovereignty, and local AI. We use free technologies, AI agents for development, and we are Linux fans.

footer.desc: The sovereign, private, and free office suite made in Spain for the world.
